mainEntity.name: Can Chicago law firms use AI chatbots for lead generation without violating ethics rules?
mainEntity.text: Can Chicago law firms use AI chatbots for lead generation without violating ethics rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Chicago firms can use AI chatbots if they disclose AI use, provide accurate info, and supervise responses per ABA Model Rule 7.1 and Illinois ethics. Include human oversight and opt-out options to avoid unauthorized practice claims.

suggestedAnswer.text: Illinois ethics allow AI tools but require transparency and accuracy. Implement chatbots trained on firm-specific data, log interactions, and route complex queries to attorneys. Track compliance via analytics; failure risks bar complaints. Test with sample queries on local traffic laws for relevance.

name: Ethical AI Chatbots for Chicago Law Firm Leads
